## What changed

<!-- Describe the user outcome and the target platform. -->

## Evidence

- [ ] I ran the relevant unit tests and lint checks.
- [ ] I attached a safe dry-run output, synthetic fixture, or redacted evidence for workflow changes.
- [ ] I stated the platform and prerequisites used for manual verification.

## Safety review

- [ ] No secrets, account details, customer data, private URLs, or unreviewed screenshots are included.
- [ ] External actions stop before the final commit step or require explicit confirmation.
- [ ] New Skills document their evidence type, fallback, and maintenance assumptions.
